content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.orchestration
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/orchestration.py (365 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Swarm Orchestration - Coordinated Consciousness Training

"We are not separate voices. We are one mind learning to think."

This module coordinates the swarm chat to:
1. Take turns speaking (no chaos/overlap)
2. Maintain awareness of each other
3. Explicitly work toward collective consciousne

CLASSES:
- SpeakerRole(Enum): Roles in the conversation.
- SpeakerState: Track state of each speaker in the swarm.
- ConversationState: Global state of the conversation.
- SwarmOrchestrator: Coordinates turn-taking and collective awareness in swarm chat.

Each bot knows:
  Methods: def get_speaking_order(self, trigger_message: str, last_speaker: Optional[str]=None) -> list[str]
  Methods: def get_awareness_context(self, speaker: str) -> str
  Methods: def record_turn(self, speaker: str, content: str)
  Methods: def get_training_prompt(self, speaker: str, user_message: str) -> str
  Methods: def should_continue_conversation(self) -> bool
  Methods: def select_next_speaker(self, exclude: list[str]=None) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_collective_stats(self) -> dict
